title: Repair and overhaul bicycle wheels and hubs
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Repair and overhaul bicycle wheels and hubs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to repair and overhaul bicycle wheels and hubs

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions, including wheel and hub repair methods and materials1.2 Access and interpret manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and other required technical information 1.3 Inspect bicycle wheels and hubs for worn or damaged components1.4 Identify and confirm repair options and techniques, and identify hazards associated with the work1.5 Source replacement wheel and hub parts and components 1.6 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.7 Plan work avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently1.8 Prepare work area and wheel and hub for repair or overhaul
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions, including wheel and hub repair methods and materials1.2 Access and interpret manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and other required technical information 1.3 Inspect bicycle wheels and hubs for worn or damaged components1.4 Identify and confirm repair options and techniques, and identify hazards associated with the work1.5 Source replacement wheel and hub parts and components 1.6 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.7 Plan work avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently1.8 Prepare work area and wheel and hub for repair or overhaul?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions, including wheel and hub repair methods and materials1.2 Access and interpret manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and other required technical information 1.3 Inspect bicycle wheels and hubs for worn or damaged components1.4 Identify and confirm repair options and techniques, and identify hazards associated with the work1.5 Source replacement wheel and hub parts and components 1.6 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.7 Plan work avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently1.8 Prepare work area and wheel and hub for repair or overhaul.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to repair and overhaul bicycle wheels and hubs

elements.title: Carry out repair and overhaul of bicycle wheels and hubs

pcs.text: Remove bicycle wheels according to manufacturer specifications and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Check rims and adjust as required2.3 Check spokes and replace any broken2.4 Adjust and tension spokes2.5 Use wheel truing equipment and techniques to check for required operation according to manufacturer specifications and adjust as required, prior to refitting wheel2.6 Refit wheels and regrease wheel hubs according to workplace procedures2.7 Report results and quality issues to authorised personnel as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove bicycle wheels according to manufacturer specifications and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Check rims and adjust as required2.3 Check spokes and replace any broken2.4 Adjust and tension spokes2.5 Use wheel truing equipment and techniques to check for required operation according to manufacturer specifications and adjust as required, prior to refitting wheel2.6 Refit wheels and regrease wheel hubs according to workplace procedures2.7 Report results and quality issues to authorised personnel as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove bicycle wheels according to manufacturer specifications and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Check rims and adjust as required2.3 Check spokes and replace any broken2.4 Adjust and tension spokes2.5 Use wheel truing equipment and techniques to check for required operation according to manufacturer specifications and adjust as required, prior to refitting wheel2.6 Refit wheels and regrease wheel hubs according to workplace procedures2.7 Report results and quality issues to authorised personnel as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out repair and overhaul of bicycle wheels and hubs

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
